message:
test(benchmarks): add stability tests and mock infrastructure

- Add test_benchmark_stability to memory, disk, and compilation benchmarks
- Create mock infrastructure (MockClock, MockFileSystem, MockNetwork)
- Mock infrastructure enables deterministic testing without real hardware
- Stability tests verify benchmark variance stays within acceptable range

Closes bead remote_compilation_helper-1dr

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
